mapper.select: /* wms-master-store-sql-oracle.xml - selectMapStore */ SELECT A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.LOGGRPCD , A.DCKEY , A.STORE_KEY , A.STORE_NAME , A.TEL1 , A.FCTYPE , A.OLD_STORE_KEY , A.OWNER_NAME , A.STARTDATE , A.REGDATE , A.REGNO , A.DLDAY , A.KTG_AREA_CD , A.DELYN , A.ADDRID , A.CLOSDATE , A.LDG_TIME , A.UNLDG_TIME , A.ZIPCODE , A.ADDRESS1 , A.ADDRESS2 , A.MAXOVERQTY , A.ISMANAGESTORE FROM TWORK_MST_STORE A WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.DCKEY = #{dckey} AND A.STORE_KEY = #{storeKey}
